caption: A person's hands are seen opening and manipulating boxes of collectible cards on a green surface. In the initial frames, the person opens a white and blue cardboard box, while several other sealed boxes with "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" printed on them are visible in the background. A small inset video in the lower center shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap. The screen is framed by a large orange and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and a smaller logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS casebreaks.com". As the sequence progresses, the person holds a white box and pulls out a single collectible card encased in a protective plastic sleeve. The scene shifts from focusing on the bulk packaging to highlighting an individual card being removed from the box.
